description:
Court notebook with four distinct records.

(I) See PGPID 40206

(II) See PGPID 40207

(III) See PGPID 40208

(IV) Entry enumerating what left (or what has gone missing?) from the dowry of Maliha bt. Yeḥezqel ha-Kohen with her husband Yosef b. Yaʿaqov. The couple's original trousseau list is found in T-S 10J7.13 (PGPID 3050) from ca. 1090 CE. 

(Information in part from Goitein's index card with additions by MY/AA/ASE). Join: Alan Elbaum.
description_he: פנקס בית דין עם ארבעה רישומים שונים; כולל רישום המפרט פריטים שנעלמו מנדוניית מליחה בת יחזקאל הכהן
